subject: [PATCH v5 2/5] sunrpc: hardcode pool_mode to pernode, remove other modes

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch hardcodes the pool mode to pernode, removing other modes from the sunrpc code. The default behavior on multi-NUMA hosts changes to one pool per NUMA node, which is considered the right choice everywhere. This change simplifies the code by removing mode-based switch statements and ensures proper thread affinity and NUMA-local memory allocation. The patch also updates documentation and preserves backward compatibility for module parameters and netlink interfaces.
